creator: np@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you please provide the output of these commands after a clean reboot,
when cxl0 is administratively UP but doesn't link up:

# dmesg | egrep 't5nex|cxl'
# ifconfig -mvvv
# sysctl -n dev.t5nex.0.devlog

And you don't need "media 10Gbase-T mediaopt full-duplex rxcsum txcsum" in
your rc.conf, just ifconfig_cxl<n>="up" will do.  Can you try that?
